title: Be able to order groups by creation date of the group (newest first)
excerpt: Hi we have an automation that creats groups, but groups are created on the bottom. We would like to see new created groups on the top (so new groups are more visible than old groups). It would be great if we could order …

posts.author: elena (elena)
posts.cookedHtml: Hi we have an automation that creats groups, but groups are created on the bottom. We would like to see new created groups on the top (so new groups are more visible than old groups). It would be great if we could order the groups by creation date of the group.

posts.author: sean_pienaar (Sean)
posts.cookedHtml: I would very much like to see this feature please
